prompt: The same listener asked for a hypothetical 'SBS combine': what tests should a generally strong/fit/athletic person repeat every ~12 weeks to track progress?
assertions: Mentions aerobic testing (e.g., 2-mile run, 5K, or similar endurance event)
Mentions anaerobic or sprint testing (e.g., 400-800m or 40-100m distances)
Mentions explosive power tests (e.g., vertical jump, broad jump, or medicine ball throws)
Mentions strength testing (e.g., 3RM or submaximal squat/bench/deadlift)
Suggests the full battery may be better suited as a longer periodic check (e.g., annual) rather than every 12 weeks
Covers multiple fitness capacities rather than only barbell strength
